# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { Application, Router } from "https://deno.land/x/oak@v12.6.0/mod.ts";

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age: number;
  department: string;
}

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

const router = new Router();

// Create user endpoint
router.post("/users", async (ctx) => {
  const body = await ctx.request.body({ type: "json" }).value;
  const user: User = {
    id: crypto.randomUUID(),
    ...body
  };

  await kv.set(["users", user.id], user);
  await kv.set(["users", "index", "email", user.email], user.id);
  await kv.set(["users", "index", "department", user.department], user.id);
  await kv.set(["users", "index", "name", user.name.toLowerCase()], user.id);

  ctx.response.body = { id: user.id };
});

// Search users endpoint
router.get("/users", async (ctx) => {
  const params = ctx.request.url.searchParams;
  const filters: Record<string, string> = {};

  for (const [key, value] of params.entries()) {
    if (key !== "page" && key !== "limit") {
      filters[key] = value;
    }
  }

  const page = parseInt(params.get("page") || "1");
  const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "10");
  const offset = (page - 1) * limit;

  let keys: Array<string | number> = ["users"];
  let results: User[] = [];

  if (Object.keys(filters).length > 0) {
    const filterKeys = Object.entries(filters);
    const firstFilter = filterKeys[0];
    const indexKey = ["users", "index", firstFilter[0], firstFilter[1]];
    
    const iter = kv.list({ prefix: indexKey });
    const ids: string[] = [];
    
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      ids.push(entry.value as string);
    }
    
    if (ids.length > 0) {
      const userKeys = ids.map(id => ["users", id]);
      const userEntries = await kv.getMany<User[]>(userKeys);
      results = userEntries
        .filter(entry => entry.value !== null)
        .map(entry => entry.value!)
        .filter(user => {
          return filterKeys.every(([key, value]) => {
            if (key === "name") {
              return user[key].toLowerCase().includes(value.toLowerCase());
            }
            return user[key] === value;
          });
        });
    }
  } else {
    const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix: ["users"] });
    const users: User[] = [];
    
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      if (entry.key.length === 2 && entry.key[0] === "users") {
        users.push(entry.value);
      }
    }
    
    results = users;
  }

  const paginatedResults = results.slice(offset, offset + limit);
  
  ctx.response.body = {
    data: paginatedResults,
    pagination: {
      page,
      limit,
      total: results.length,
      pages: Math.ceil(results.length / limit)
    }
  };
});

// Get user by ID
router.get("/users/:id", async (ctx) => {
  const { id } = ctx.params;
  const user = await kv.get<User>(["users", id]);
  
  if (!user.value) {
    ctx.response.status = 404;
    ctx.response.body = { error: "User not found" };
    return;
  }
  
  ctx.response.body = user.value;
});

// Update user
router.put("/users/:id", async (ctx) => {
  const { id } = ctx.params;
  const body = await ctx.request.body({ type: "json" }).value;
  
  const existingUser = await kv.get<User>(["users", id]);
  
  if (!existingUser.value) {
    ctx.response.status = 404;
    ctx.response.body = { error: "User not found" };
    return;
  }
  
  const updatedUser: User = { ...existingUser.value, ...body };
  
  await kv.set(["users", id], updatedUser);
  
  // Update indexes
  await kv.set(["users", "index", "email", updatedUser.email], id);
  await kv.set(["users", "index", "department", updatedUser.department], id);
  await kv.set(["users", "index", "name", updatedUser.name.toLowerCase()], id);
  
  ctx.response.body = { message: "User updated successfully" };
});

// Delete user
router.delete("/users/:id", async (ctx) => {
  const { id } = ctx.params;
  
  const user = await kv.get<User>(["users", id]);
  
  if (!user.value) {
    ctx.response.status = 404;
    ctx.response.body = { error: "User not found" };
    return;
  }
  
  await kv.delete(["users", id]);
  await kv.delete(["users", "index", "email", user.value.email]);
  await kv.delete(["users", "index", "department", user.value.department]);
  await kv.delete(["users", "index", "name", user.value.name.toLowerCase()]);
  
  ctx.response.body = { message: "User deleted successfully" };
});

const app = new Application();
app.use(router.routes());
app.use(router.allowedMethods());

console.log("Server running on http://localhost:8000");
await app.listen({ port: 8000 });
